## Summary

Brief description of changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] New content (guide, playbook, script)
- [ ] Update to existing content
- [ ] Bug fix (broken link, incorrect command, etc.)
- [ ] Infrastructure (CI, templates, etc.)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have tested all commands and scripts
- [ ] I have updated relevant README files
- [ ] I have followed the [Contributing Guidelines](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] All links are valid and point to existing files
- [ ] Markdown follows the project style guidelines

## Related Issues

Closes # (issue number)
